briefs.title: Proposed: Rezoning of 5227 Lane Street, Burnaby — Council to Consider
briefs.summary: Burnaby Council is set to consider a rezoning application for the property at 5227 Lane Street. A rezoning changes the official rules about how a piece of land can be used or what can be built on it.
briefs.action_required: Check the City of Burnaby website for the public hearing date and attend if this affects your property or business.
